summary.diagnosis:
*Jul 4→Jul 10 vs Jun 27→Jul 3* · Revenue -22% (1,077,482 vs 1,376,552 EGP) · Spend -24% · ROAS 5.62 (+3%).
   • CPC: 2.65 → 2.2 EGP (-17%, down (good))
   • CVR: 1.3% → 1.09% (-16%, down (drag))
   • AOV: 1,117 → 1,135 EGP (+2%, ~flat)
   *Who moved it:* *CPC 49%* of the move (helped, +39,134 EGP)  ·  *CVR 47%* of the move (hurt, -207,281 EGP)  ·  *AOV 4%* of the move (helped, +17,082 EGP).
   *Read:* *CPC* fell -17%, the biggest of the three.
     Worth about *39,134 EGP of spend*.
     That drove ROAS +3%.
     Revenue -22% because spend -24%.
   *Deeper:* biggest single mover was *BERCAU WITH BOW*, its CPC went 1.47 EGP→1.25 EGP on 16,281 EGP spend (~7% of the swing).

summary.diagnosis:
*Jul 4→Jul 10 vs Jun 27→Jul 3* · Revenue +91% (99,981 vs 52,468 EGP) · Spend +111% · ROAS 3.83 (-10%).
   • CPC: 7.66 → 9.64 EGP (+26%, up (drag))
   • CVR: 2.29% → 1.81% (-21%, down (drag))
   • AOV: 1,418 → 2,040 EGP (+44%, up (good))
   *Who moved it:* *AOV 44%* of the move (helped, +30,478 EGP)  ·  *CVR 28%* of the move (hurt, -26,497 EGP)  ·  *CPC 28%* of the move (hurt, -5,358 EGP).
   *Read:* *AOV* rose +44%, the biggest of the three.
     Worth about *30,478 EGP of revenue*.
     That drove ROAS -10%.
     Revenue +91% because spend +111%.
   *Deeper:* biggest single mover was <https://business.facebook.com/adsmanager/manage/ads?act=336343742536460&selected_ad_ids=120254859180460011|Big personality catalogue   06-28>, its AOV went 2296.67 EGP→6334.0 EGP on 1,672 EGP spend (~26% of the swing).
